## Linked issue

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] If this touches the render or export path, it's been checked against the determinism gate (see [`docs/determinism.md`](../docs/determinism.md) — `Verify ×2` must stay byte-identical)

Note: this is a personal, source-available project on a fairly opinionated internal
roadmap — see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md). Pull requests are welcome but
may be declined, even good ones.
